name: Compander
explanation: A companding 'noise-reduction character' processor in the Dolby A/SR + HX lineage. Distinct from the factory's studio compressors: a level-dependent compress→expand with high-frequency pre-emphasis that imparts the characteristic tape-NR sheen and gentle breathing — used as a tone/dynamics colour. Controls: Squeeze (compand depth), HF (high-shelf emphasis), Tone (tilt), Output and Mix.
